name: Solid
summary: The Solid class represents the physical object in the model created by a part instance. A solid instance can be used to query the actual geometry of the part and intersect that geometry with, for example, lines and planes.

methods.name: GetAllIntersectionPoints
methods.summary: Used to get all the intersection points between the solid and a plane. Does not arrange the points into polygons, thus a lot faster.

methods.name: GetCutPart
methods.summary: Returns a shell enumerator for the solid th at results cutting this solid with the given solid.

methods.name: GetEdgeEnumerator
methods.summary: Returns a new edge enumerator in the current plane.

methods.name: GetFaceEnumerator
methods.summary: Returns a new face enumerator in the current plane.

methods.name: Intersect(LineSegment)
methods.summary: Returns a list of line - solid intersection points.

methods.name: Intersect(Point, Point)
methods.summary: Returns a list of line - solid intersection points.

methods.name: Intersect(Point, Point, Point)
methods.summary: Returns a list of plane - solid intersection points. The first item of the list contains a list of the outmost intersection polygon and the rest of the items (if there are any) inner polygons.

methods.name: IntersectAllFaces
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator for an array list of lists of plane - solid intersection points from all intersecting faces. The first item of one list contains points of the outmost intersection polygon and then the inner polygons (if there are any).

methods.name: IsValid
methods.summary: Returns if the solid is valid.

properties.name: MaximumPoint
properties.summary: Gets the maximum axis-aligned point of the solid in the current plane.

properties.name: MinimumPoint
properties.summary: Gets the minimum axis-aligned point of the solid in the current plane.
